title: Coordinate the preparation of a regional resource management plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate the preparation of a regional resource management plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review existing information

pcs.text: Access and review scoping documents and plans to determine starting point for planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review scoping documents and plans to determine starting point for planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review scoping documents and plans to determine starting point for planning process.
